data.title: Bitcoin miners were quick to utilize nuclear energy, as AI-driven data center demand boosts nuclear power usage in the US.
data.description: The resurgence in demand for data centers powered by AI technology has led to a renewed interest in nuclear energy across the United States. Bitcoin miners, in particular, have been quick to utilize nuclear power to support their high-performance computing activities. This trend underscores the effectiveness of nuclear energy in meeting the energy-intensive needs of modern technology, with an increasing number of companies looking to leverage its benefits.

data.title: KuCoin introduces perpetual futures for Tesla and Strategy stocks, enabling 24/7 speculation without owning shares.
data.description: Investors can engage in speculation on the price fluctuations of the two companies' shares at any time without actually possessing the underlying stocks using USDt-settled contracts. This offers the opportunity for traders to participate in the market dynamics.

data.title: XRP Up 2% Without ETF Inflows: What Is Going On?
data.description: XRP has seen a 2% increase in value despite experiencing ETF outflows on Thursday. Derivatives volume has spiked by 35% in the last 24 hours. XRP spot ETFs observed $6.08 million in net outflows on March 12, contributing to a total net asset value of $967.77 million. Interestingly, large inflows of $34.73 million were noted on March 6 and 9, offset by outflows on March 5, 10, and 12. U.S.-listed XRP ETFs reported approximately $3.9 million in outflows during the period, indicating that institutional investors may be reducing their positions despite the price upsurge. On the other hand, a surge in trading volume by 35% amounting to $4.45 billion and a 9.37% rise in open interest to $2.66 billion in derivatives indicate significant market activity.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Fades On Inflation, GDP Surprise; Nvidia Turns Lower (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following unexpected inflation and GDP data. Adobe stock saw a significant drop due to earnings. The stock market today witnessed the Dow fading due to surprises in inflation and GDP, whereas Nvidia also turned lower. This live coverage highlights the impact of these events on investors.

data.title: Dune Analytics releases CLI and Skills framework for AI agents, providing direct blockchain data access on 130+ chains.
data.description: Dune has released a new CLI and Skills framework that enables AI agents to access blockchain data directly through terminals. This allows AI agents to interact with data from over 130 different chains autonomously, without requiring human intervention.

data.description: On March 13, 2026, in New Delhi, a new research study by Vyansa Intelligence revealed that the Cardiovascular Devices Market in the United States is expected to experience significant growth, with a projected Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of approximately 9.35% between 2026 and 2032. data.title: Johnson & Johnson highlights promising first-in-human Erda-iDRS (formerly TAR-210) results in intermediate-risk non-muscle-invasive bladder cancer
data.description: New data from EAU 2026 revealed that Erda-iDRS demonstrated an impressive 89% complete response rate in cases of intermediate-risk disease. The patients also experienced durable responses lasting over 18 months, along with a manageable safety profile. This treatment shows promise as a potential first targeted therapy for early-stage bladder cancer. The study was presented in Raritan, N.J. in March.

data.title: US sanctions six North Koreans and two entities for alleged $800 million fraud, targeting US companies with crypto scheme.
data.description: The United States imposed sanctions on six individuals and two entities from North Korea for their involvement in a cryptocurrency-driven fraud scam aimed at U.S. companies.

data.title: Great Sky Unveils Brain-like Computing Architecture Built for the Next Era of AI
data.description: A Colorado-based company, Great Sky, has unveiled its groundbreaking AI computing architecture. The company revealed its technology to the public along with successful fundraising and key commercial achievements. The superconducting optoelectronic innovation has attracted a substantial $14 million seed funding led by Bison Ventures. data.title: Security Federal Announces Corrected Dividend of $0.16 per share in Connection with its Previously Announced Quarterly Dividend
data.description: A company based in Aiken, South Carolina, known as Security Federal Corporation, the parent company of Security Federal Bank, recently issued a correction to their previous announcement. Initially, on March 2, 2026, the company had stated that a quarterly dividend of $0.15 per share would be distributed around March 15, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of February 28, 2026. However, they have now revised this dividend amount to $0.16 per share. The modification in dividend amount is the only change made, with all other terms and conditions remaining the same.

data.title: Tevogen.AI Reports Advancements in PredicTcell™ Beta, Demonstrates Improved Precision Metrics and Expands Proprietary AI Infrastructure
data.description: Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc., based in Warren, N.J., revealed significant progress in its artificial intelligence platform, Tevogen.AI, on March 13, 2026. The company, listed as TVGN on Nasdaq, reported improvements in performance metrics.

data.title: Injective (INJ) introduces AI toolkit with 11 open-source tools for autonomous trading agents to trade futures and deploy contracts.
data.description: Injective (INJ) has recently launched 11 open-source tools that allow AI agents to engage in trading perpetual futures, initiate contracts, and facilitate the bridging of assets by following natural language commands. These tools aim to enhance the efficiency and accessibility of these processes within the cryptocurrency space.
